_about: Product Builder v1.1.1 registry — the single source of truth the build loop edits. prototype.html renders from this file (a thin adapter maps it onto the in-memory PB_DATA shape the render machinery reads). DATA ONLY — render-function bodies are generated from components[]/screens[] at /pb:build --render. Schema is documented in prototype-builder.md.

overview.objectives: Let returning seekers sign in and new sellers register with minimal friction; verify email via a 6-digit code.

principles.title: Error = border + text
principles.body: Error states show BOTH a danger border AND error text.

principles.title: Visible focus
principles.body: Every interactive element has a visible focus state.

userInsights.researchSummary: Users abandon at the password step; ask for social + OTP.
userInsights.executiveSummary: Cut auth friction: add OTP and keep the email on error.

tradeoffs.title: OTP vs magic link
tradeoffs.question: How to verify a new email?
tradeoffs.why: Stays in-app on mobile; lower abandon than leaving for an email client.

cover.title: Property Auth — prototype
cover.summary: Let returning seekers sign in and new sellers register with minimal friction; verify email via a 6-digit code.
